info.description: Retreats, workshops, corporate wellbeing, speaking engagements

date.description: Click the month name at top of the picker to jump months/years. Use the < > arrows to step one month at a time. Leave empty for evergreen items (no fixed date).

booking_url.description: Where the 'Book now' / 'Buy' button takes people. Examples: https://buy.stripe.com/abcd, https://calendly.com/anna/intro, or a path like /the-work/regulated. Leave blank to hide the button.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Use the 'Generate SEO' button if available, then edit.
